hero.title: Your online store

accounting.title: Integrated Accounting
accounting.desc: Track your sales, expenses, and profits in one place with clear reports.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.desc: Know who visits your store and what they buy to make data-driven decisions.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.desc: A dedicated AI assistant for each store to answer customer questions and help them shop.

delivery.title: Multiple Delivery Options
delivery.desc: Add delivery methods that work for you, local or international, with flexible pricing.

channels.title: Multiple Sales Channels
channels.desc: Sell through your store, WhatsApp, Snapchat, and all social media platforms.

3.title: Start Selling
3.desc: Your store is ready on your custom link. Start promoting and selling immediately
